name: Omweso
author: AGP
description: Omweso, the traditional four-row Ugandan (Baganda) Mancala. Each player owns two rows of eight pits and sows counterclockwise around their own side only, relaying through occupied pits. Land in an occupied inner-row pit whose opposing column is full to capture the opponent's two pits and re-sow the loot. Seeds never leave the board — you win when your opponent can no longer move.
